title: ActionRiskConfig — action impact classification file
description: JSON Schema for .intent/enforcement/config/action_risk.yaml. Governs the structure of the action-id-to-impact-level mapping consumed by src/shared/infrastructure/intent/action_risk.py and overlaid onto ActionDefinition at ActionExecutor init. Authority: ADR-008 (impact classification), ADR-120 D1 (dict format with artifact_types). Two entry forms are supported: the flat string form (legacy, still valid) and the dict form (ADR-120 D1, adds artifact_type constraints). Closed vocabulary: safe | moderate | dangerous. A missing action_id entry raises ConstitutionalError at ActionExecutor startup. This file uses the .schema.json suffix and is intentionally skipped by intent_validator.py (which validates .json contracts only).

actions.description: Map from action_id (registered AtomicAction identifier) to impact classification. Every action registered via @register_action MUST have an entry here; a missing entry raises ConstitutionalError at ActionExecutor startup (src/body/atomic/registry.py).

oneOf.description: Flat string form (unconstrained action). Legacy format, still valid per ADR-120 D1. safe=auto-execute; moderate=human approval required; dangerous=blocked unless explicitly authorized.
Dict form introduced by ADR-120 D1. Supports optional artifact_types constraint.

impact_level.description: Impact classification. safe=auto-execute; moderate=human approval required; dangerous=blocked unless explicitly authorized.

artifact_types.description: F-41 artifact_type IDs this action is constrained to. Action is only dispatched for artifacts whose type appears in this list. Empty or absent means unconstrained — action may be dispatched for any artifact type.
